## Type

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checks

Run from the repo root and confirm clean:

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run knip`
- [ ] `bun run test` (if your change touches code under test)
